creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to László Károlyi from comment #4)

Did you try my suggestion at comment #3?
There's no feedback both here and Bug 90815.

Unfportunately, patch on Bug 90815 is NOT committed.

One good news is that rmacklem@ is working on updating smbfs to support SMBv2 and later. [1]
Hopefully, remaining problems could be fixed with it.
Pray for his work goes successful.

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2022-January/001426.html
